sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 184 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.20 2. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Pursuant to the judgment of Supreme Court in the case of Millat Tractor’s reported as 2024 SCMR 700, learned counsel states that this reference application is not pressed and may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
